name: evogym_walker
description: Evolutionary Walker-v0 soft-robot morphology search via evogym. Direction: maximize forward reward, multi-seed eval (default 3 seeds) due to stochastic simulator.
venv_reason: evogym pins requires-python <3.11 and bundles a C++ simulator; isolated Py3.10 venv keeps modalauto Python-version-agnostic
